user_query: I'm planning a family trip to a remote island and we need a map with English labels for navigation. Can you provide us with a map tile for zoom level 3, x-coordinate 6, and y-coordinate 3? Also, suggest some popular tourist attractions, webcams, and local accommodations on the island.

TaskList.description: Fetch a map tile with English labels for the specified zoom level and coordinates.
Retrieve a list of popular tourist attractions on the remote island.
Find available webcams on the island to view real-time conditions.
Search for local accommodations available for booking on the island.
